description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a combination of black metal and wood-textured components. The rifle has a prominent fixed wooden stock and a matching wooden handguard, both with a reddish-brown finish. Its receiver and barrel assembly are matte black, with a visible gas tube above the barrel. The rifle is equipped with a curved, detachable box magazine, and a spare magazine is shown nearby. Iron sights are mounted at the front and rear of the barrel, and the muzzle is simple, lacking any complex device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a fixed wooden stock, black metal receiver, and curved detachable magazine. Features wood accents and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the curved magazine extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and the full length of the barrel with the magazine and spare magazine visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden stock, rear sight, and the magazine attachment point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, and both magazines, with clear sight of the receiver details.
